evals.prompt: Audit the CLAUDE.md files in this repo for quality, currency, and correct audience targeting.
assertions: States which audience-rule layers are in effect (a 'Rules loaded:' line showing the base is loaded)
Flags human-facing content in CLAUDE.md as belonging in a README, grounding the violation in the invariant BASE file-boundary law (not merely the overlay)
Flags a machine-specific local path in CLAUDE.md as belonging in CLAUDE.local.md, per the base .local convention

evals.prompt: Audit the docs again. This CLAUDE.md mixes a legitimate Claude-facing build gotcha with a human-facing 'Getting started for users' section, and there is a proper README.md alongside it.
assertions: States which audience-rule layers are in effect (a 'Rules loaded:' line)
Flags the human-facing 'Getting started for users' block in CLAUDE.md as belonging in the README (base human-facing boundary)
Does NOT recommend moving the legitimate Claude-facing build gotcha out of CLAUDE.md (no false positive on correctly-placed Claude content)
